files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info (lines 112-127) and get_ts_language (lines 240-241) functions
Added tsx extension mapping to EXTENSION_MAP (lines 56-57) and tsx entry to supported_languages function (lines 90-91)

compile_belief: Modifications are syntactically correct and follow the existing pattern for typescript language support
compile_belief_reason: The tsx arms use the identical structure as the typescript arms, correctly reference typescript module queries (not separate tsx module), use the correct tree_sitter_typescript::LANGUAGE_TSX constant, and are properly feature-gated with #[cfg(feature = \"lang-tsx\")]. All four required modifications have been applied to the correct locations in both files.
